purpose: de-risk the three expensive unknowns before full sculpture geometry
claim: concept-only local subsystem package; not full-assembly, motion-complete, or fabrication-complete

modules.name: 01_autonomous_power_module_concept
modules.learning_objective: prove the visible-energy architecture can separate hidden motor, visible macro motion, storage, and output shaft before whole-object CAD
pass_criteria: storage and output are distinct roles
external low-voltage power claim remains explicit

modules.name: 02_spatial_riser_concept
modules.learning_objective: prove the selected concept contains a real lower-plane to elevated-plane transfer before large geometry
pass_criteria: input and output axes occupy different heights
support hubs exist at both ends of the riser

modules.name: 03_canted_cage_sightline_concept
modules.learning_objective: prove the sculpture can tilt the carrier while preserving an open fine-motion sightline
pass_criteria: fine-motion zone remains open in the concept envelope
tilt is bounded before full-support design
non_claims: hero-view composition of the complete sculpture proven
